resolved.reason: Re-reviewed 2026-04-28. Spec now contains five requirements: Conformance Mode, Evaluation Mode, Simulation Mode (all three explicitly excluded by prototype-scope.spec.md), plus two new requirements: Cascade Depth (part of Simulation Mode, still excluded) and Mode Composition (depends on all three modes, all still excluded). No requirement is referenced by any prototype spec for implementation. The Cascade Depth schema field is addressed by task-072 via scene-graph-schema.spec.md, which is an extraction spec that independently mandates the field. PERMANENTLY PROHIBITED: also blocked by check-assigned-spec-in-scope.sh (prohibited path list). Do not assign tasks from this spec.
resolved.reopen_condition: prototype-scope.spec.md un-excludes at least one of: Conformance Mode, Evaluation Mode, Simulation Mode

resolved.reason: project guidelines: NFRs are cross-cutting constraints embedded as acceptance criteria on existing tasks, not standalone work items

resolved.reason: All 8 Extraction Layer requirements, 10 Composition Layer primitives, 3 Composition Principles, and 2 Primitive Interaction constraints covered by tasks 074–124. Overlay/Facet Composition (LLM-driven selection) excluded from prototype. Confirmed fully covered in pass 215 (2026-04-28).
